title: Se una notte d'inverno un viaggiatore
titleEn: If on a winter's night a traveler
author: Italo Calvino

witnesses.label: Weaver 1981
witnesses.note: The sole English translation of this work; no competing English version exists.

alignment.scheme: 12 second-person frame chapters + 10 titled incipits, interleaved (frame, incipit, frame, incipit, ...) then frames 11 and 12 to close
incipitTitlesIt: Se una notte d'inverno un viaggiatore
Senza temere il vento e la vertigine
Guarda in basso dove l'ombra s'addensa
In una rete di linee che s'allacciano
In una rete di linee che s'intersecano
Sul tappeto di foglie illuminate dalla luna
Quale storia laggiù attende la fine?
incipitTitlesEn: If on a winter's night a traveler
Without fear of wind or vertigo
Looks down in the gathering shadow
In a network of lines that enlace
In a network of lines that intersect
On the carpet of leaves illuminated by the moon
What story down there awaits its end?
alignment.notes: VERIFIED by extraction 2026-07-11: The English EPUB extracts cleanly into 22 units — 12 frame chapters titled [1]..[12] plus the 10 titled incipits above, each in its own file. The Italian EPUB extracts into 14 chunks that MERGE each frame chapter with the incipit that follows it; split each Italian chunk at its incipit-title heading (incipitTitlesIt) to recover the 22 units, then pair Italian unit N with English unit N by reading order. Frontmatter/backmatter (Contents, About the Author, cover) must be dropped, not counted as units.
